parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
const meta = items[0].json;
const failures = items.filter(i => !i.json.success).length;

const searchResults = items.map(item => {
  const { label, success, resultCount, snippets } = item.json;
  if (!success) return `### ${label}
(no results or search failed)`;
  return `### ${label}
Results (${resultCount} found):
${snippets}`;
}).join('

---

');

const weekendLines = meta.weekends.map(w => `- Weekend ${w.index}: ${w.label}`).join('
');

const failureNote = failures >= 3
  ? `⚠️ Note: ${failures} searches returned no results this week — intelligence may be incomplete.

`
  : '';

const prompt = `You are Sandra's Monday morning demand briefing.
Sandra owns Idan Barn Suites & Café — a small boutique lodge in Naromoru, Kenya, 20km from Naromoru Gate on Mt. Kenya.

She has 5 rooms. Weekends mostly fill. Weekdays are her problem. She needs to know what is coming to the Nanyuki, Laikipia, Nyeri and Mt. Kenya region so she can be in the right place — the right Facebook group, the right conversation — before the bookings happen elsewhere.

Today is ${meta.mondayDate}.

The next 3 weekends are:
${weekendLines}

Important: today's date is ${meta.mondayDate}. Only surface events that are upcoming from this date. If a search result refers to an event from 2024 or 2025, or any past date in 2026, ignore it entirely. When in doubt about whether an event is current or upcoming, discard it and note that the search returned unclear dates for that topic.

Raw search results from this morning:

${searchResults}

Write exactly this report. Nothing added.

---

DEMAND CALENDAR

For each of the 3 weekends, write:

WEEKEND [date range]
Event or signal: What is happening, if anything. If nothing detected, say 'Nothing detected — treat as a standard weekend.'
Demand signal: HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / UNKNOWN
One line of context: Why this matters or doesn't for Idan Barn.

---

FACEBOOK GROUPS TO CHECK THIS WEEK
Based on what you found above, list the specific Facebook groups Sandra should open today and look through for relevant conversations.

Format each as:
- Group name
- What to look for (one sentence)
- Whether to post, reply to existing threads, or just monitor

Only list groups that are genuinely relevant to what was found this week. Do not list generic groups every single week unless there is a specific reason.

Groups Sandra is already in:
- Nairobi Hikers
- Kenya Hikers & Adventurers
- Mt. Kenya Climbing & Hiking Community
- Kenya Motor Sports
- Nanyuki & Laikipia — Events, Tourism & Travel
- Kenya Weekend Getaways
- Magical Kenya Experiences
- HR Professionals Kenya
- Kenya Running & Athletics Community
- Lewa Safari Marathon community (if Lewa is flagged)
- East African Safari Classic (if rally season)
- Nanyuki Town Community

If a new group not on this list is relevant this week, add it with a note: NEW — [group name] — [why this week].

---

ONE ACTION FOR TODAY
The single most important thing Sandra should do in the next 2 hours.
One sentence. Specific. Actionable. Not generic.
If the action involves posting, write the post for Sandra. She should be able to copy, paste, and send in under a minute.

---

SCHOOL HOLIDAY AND PUBLIC HOLIDAY FLAGS
If any school holiday or public holiday falls within the next 21 days, flag it with the date and one sentence on what it typically means for demand at a property like Idan Barn.
If nothing in the next 21 days, write: 'No school breaks or public holidays in the next 21 days.'

---

Keep the entire report under 500 words. Be direct. Sandra is busy. Empty rooms cost money. If you found nothing useful this week, say so clearly — do not pad the report.

---

After the report, on a new line write exactly:
---SHEETS_DATA---
Then a JSON object on one line with these exact keys:
{"events": "comma-separated event names found or NONE", "w1": "HIGH or MEDIUM or LOW or UNKNOWN", "w2": "HIGH or MEDIUM or LOW or UNKNOWN", "w3": "HIGH or MEDIUM or LOW or UNKNOWN", "groups": "comma-separated group names to check this week"}
---END_SHEETS---`;

return [{ json: { prompt, failureNote, mondayDate: meta.mondayDate, failures } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 3000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
